allowed_claims: STWM predicts future semantic trace-unit fields under free rollout.
Copy-gated residual transition improves changed semantic states while preserving stable states in the mixed protocol.
The result holds on mixed VSPW+VIPSeg free-rollout evaluation.
forbidden_claims: Dense trace field without density evidence.
lodo_limitation: Dedicated LODO is negative in both directions and must be presented as a domain-shift limitation rather than hidden or reframed as a method failure.
